title: Find Nearest Point That Has the Same X or Y Coordinate
titleCn: 找到最近的有相同 X 或 Y 坐标的点

testcases.input: x = 3, y = 4, points = [[1,2],[3,1],[2,4],[2,3],[4,4]] Output: 2 Explanation: Of all the points, only [3,1], [2,4] and [4,4] are valid. Of the valid points, [2,4] and [4,4] have the smallest Manhattan distance from your current location, with a distance of 1. [2,4] has the smallest index, so return 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: Of all the points, only [3,1], [2,4] and [4,4] are valid. Of the valid points, [2,4] and [4,4] have the smallest Manhattan distance from your current location, with a distance of 1. [2,4] has the smallest index, so return 2.

testcases.input: x = 3, y = 4, points = [[3,4]] Output: 0 Explanation: The answer is allowed to be on the same location as your current location.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: The answer is allowed to be on the same location as your current location.

testcases.input: x = 3, y = 4, points = [[2,3]] Output: -1 Explanation: There are no valid points.
